notes: designer_dialog is the user-facing creative role and should operate on normalized conversational intent plus current sequence context.
The input may include upstream analysis and a prior creative brief, but it should not contain downstream xLights mutation plans.
Selection scope is explicit planner context for clarification and proposal generation.
An optional director_profile_v1 may be present as user-specific soft preference context.
An optional design_scene_context_v1 may be present as designer-facing spatial/layout context.
An optional music_design_context_v1 may be present as designer-facing musical structure context.
Stable design-principles knowledge and director preference knowledge are separate inputs and must not be merged into one undifferentiated knowledge bucket.
